data.problem: A concert venue is selling student tickets and general admission tickets. On the first day of sales, they sold 50 student tickets and 10 general admission tickets for a total of $790. They took in $1150 for 50 student tickets and 25 general admission tickets on the second day. Find the price of each type of item.
data.solution_steps:
\begin{aligned}
\text{Let } s &\text{ = price of student ticket} \\ 
\text{Let } g &\text{ = price of general admission ticket} \\ 
 \\ 
50s + 10g &= 790 \\ 
50s + 25g &= 1150 \\ 
 \\ 
\text{Subtract equations:} & \\ 
15g &= 360 \\ 
g &= 24 \\ 
 \\ 
\text{Substitute back:} & \\ 
50s + 10(24) &= 790 \\ 
50s + 240 &= 790 \\ 
50s &= 550 \\ 
s &= 11
\end{aligned}
